description: All video prompts from the massive hits collection, unified in a single JSON file with correct resolutions and aspect ratios

videos.title: Speedboat Chase
videos.prompt: Two speedboats race across choppy ocean, engines screaming as they leap over waves. Camera mounted low tracks from behind, capturing water spray drenching the lens and hulls slamming down with violent impacts. Sun glare on water, desperate and fast.
videos.negative_prompt: blur, distort, low quality, calm water, static

videos.title: Tactical Operator Movement
videos.prompt: A tactical operator moves swiftly through an abandoned urban building, weapon raised and scanning corners. Handheld camera follows closely from behind as they breach through doorways. Dust particles float in shafts of broken window light, tense atmosphere, professional and urgent.
videos.negative_prompt: blur, distort, low quality, peaceful, slow

videos.title: Drone Racing Course
videos.prompt: An FPV racing drone screams through a neon obstacle course, banking hard through gates. Camera is the drone's perspective, tilting and rolling with each maneuver. LED gates strobe past, motion blur on turns, other drones visible in peripheral, futuristic and technical.
videos.negative_prompt: blur, distort, low quality, slow, static camera

videos.title: Rock Climbing Dynamic Move
videos.prompt: A climber lunges for a distant hold, body fully extended in mid-air. Camera zooms in as fingers grip rock, chalk puffing from impact. Muscles strain, rope swinging below, canyon wall stretching down hundreds of feet, breathtaking and tense.
videos.negative_prompt: blur, distort, low quality, ground level, safe

videos.title: Downhill Powder Carving
videos.prompt: A snowboarder carves aggressively down a steep mountain face, sending massive plumes of powder spray behind them. Camera tracks from the side capturing the speed and spray against blue sky. Fresh snow explodes with each turn, alpine peaks in background, exhilarating and beautiful.
videos.negative_prompt: blur, distort, low quality, slow, flat terrain

videos.title: Spaceman Helmet Reflection Close-Up
videos.prompt: A spaceman stands on lunar surface, helmet reflecting Earth in visor. Camera slowly dollies in to extreme close-up of helmet reflection. Bright sunlight from one side creates dramatic contrast, shadow details visible in suit texture. Dust settles gently on boots, serene and contemplative.
videos.negative_prompt: blur, distort, low quality, particles, glowing effects, lens flares, energy
videos.lighting: Harsh directional sunlight with shadow detail

Camera tracks in smooth slow-motion as dirt sprays from knobby tires, rider extended horizontally. Lands hard, suspension bottoming out, dust cloud erupting, crowd visible in background, bold and technical.
